description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Common build & test workflow that accepts four required string inputs: install-name, os, build, and compiler. The workflow should run on a job named common-build-and-test with a dynamic name based on the inputs. It should check out the repository, install prerequisites, create a build directory, configure CMake with the specified build type and warning settings, build the project, run tests, and install and uninstall the project.
